title: Add a new action into selected state

name.description: The name of the new action
name.x-prompt: Provide the action name (nested actions can be specified with a '.' – e.g., item.load).

path.description: The path at which to create the component file, relative to the current workspace. Default is a folder with the same name as the component in the project root.

withPayload.description: Is there an [payload] of the action?
withPayload.x-prompt: Is there an [payload] of the action?

withEffect.description: Is there an [effect] of the action?
withEffect.x-prompt: Is there an [effect] of the action?
